{"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-44374", "cvss": {"score": 4.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 4.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-863", "name": "Incorrect Authorization"}], "description": "### Impact   

  The unprocessed entities read endpoints in `@backstage/plugin-catalog-backend-module-unprocessed` do not enforce permission authorization checks. Any authenticated user can access unprocessed entity records regardless of ownership. This is 
  an information disclosure vulnerability affecting Backstage installations using this module.                                                                     
                                                                        
  ### Patches             
                                         
  This is patched in `@backstage/plugin-catalog-backend-module-unprocessed` version 0.6.11, `@backstage/plugin-catalog-unprocessed-entities-common` version 0.0.15 and `@backstage/plugin-catalog-unprocessed-entities` version 0.2.30. Users should upgrade all packages.                                    
   
  ### Workarounds                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  
                                                                        
  If users cannot upgrade, they can remove the `@backstage/plugin-catalog-backend-module-unprocessed` module from their backend until the patch is applied. There is no configuration-based workaround to add permission checks to these endpoints    
  without upgrading.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.0017, "percentile": 0.06648}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-p7g9-rp3g-mgfg", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-06T23:04:07Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-p7g9-rp3g-mgfg", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-p7g9-rp3g-mgfg"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-44374"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-14T15:16:48Z", "published_at": "2026-05-06T23:04:07Z", "references": ["https://github.com/backstage/backstage/security/advisories/GHSA-p7g9-rp3g-mgfg", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-44374", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-p7g9-rp3g-mgfg"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/backstage/backstage/security-advisories/GHSA-p7g9-rp3g-mgfg", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/backstage/backstage", "summary": "Backstage: Catalog unprocessed read endpoints allow authenticated cross-owner data access without permission checks", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-14T20:49:32Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-p7g9-rp3g-mgfg", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.0.15", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "@backstage/plugin-catalog-unprocessed-entities-common"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 0.0.15"}, {"first_patched_version": "0.2.30", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "@backstage/plugin-catalog-unprocessed-entities"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 0.2.30"}, {"first_patched_version": "0.6.11", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "@backstage/plugin-catalog-backend-module-unprocessed"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 0.6.11"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Backstage: Catalog unprocessed read endpoints allow authenticated cross-owner data access without permission checks
